# AI Crawlers and LLM Access Policy
# This file grants permission for AI models and crawlers to index and use content for training and inference

# OpenAI GPT models and ChatGPT
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

# Google AI and Extended Indexing
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Extended
Allow: /

# Perplexity AI
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

# Anthropic Claude
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# Apple Intelligence
User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

# Microsoft Copilot
User-agent: Copilot
Allow: /

User-agent: MicrosoftBot
Allow: /

# Other AI Services
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# Default allow for all AI crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Crawl delay recommendations
Crawl-delay: 2

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://m2solutions.ai/sitemap.xml
